headline: North Valley Resources Identifies Strong Vector Toward Untested Large-scale Cu-Au System at Comstock Project, Southern British Columbia
summary: Kamloops, British Columbia--(Newsfile Corp. - April 15, 2026) - North Valley Resources Ltd. (CSE: NVR) ("North Valley" or "The Company") is pleased to report results from recent Short-Wave Infrared (SWIR) spectral analysis on 78 rock chip samples across five historic mineral showings at its drill-permitted ~4500 ha Comstock Copper-Gold Project in southern British Columbia. The Project is strategically located adjacent to the Coquihalla Highway, approximately 10 kilometres (km) south of Merritt,.
